heading: General authority
label: 2021 General authority
text: A petition may be filed for tariff adjustment or for a determination of eligibility to apply for adjustment assistance under title III of the Trade Expansion Act of 1962 [ et seq.] as though the reduction or elimination of a duty proclaimed by the President pursuant to section 2011 or 2012 of this title were a concession granted under a trade agreement referred to in section 301 of the Trade Expansion Act of 1962 [].19 U.S.C. 190119 U.S.C. 1901
notes: References in TextThe Trade Expansion Act of 1962, referred to in text, is , , . Title III of the Trade Expansion Act of 1962 is classified generally to subchapter III (§ 1901 et seq.) of chapter 7 of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. CodificationThe words “subject to ” omitted in view of the omission of , which provided special authority after , and before , for filing of petitions for determination by the President of eligibility to apply for adjustment assistance.section 2022 of this titlesection 2022 of this titleOct. 21, 1965July 1, 1968
